hooks.command: command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'ibkr plugin: jq missing on PATH; failing closed on trading verbs' >&2; exit 2; }; jq -e '.tool_input.command | test("(^|[/\\s])ibkr\\s+(order|trade|cancel)\\b")' >/dev/null && exit 2 || exit 0

command -v ibkr >/dev/null 2>&1 || printf '
[ibkr plugin] The `ibkr` binary is not on your PATH.
Install it with one of:
  go install github.com/osauer/ibkr/cmd/ibkr@latest
  make install   (from a checkout of github.com/osauer/ibkr)
Then restart your Claude Code session.

'
